parameters.subject: Appointment Confirmed — Please Save the Date
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'patient_name').text }},

Your appointment has been confirmed.

Date: {{ $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_date').date }}
Time: {{ $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_time').text }}
Reason: {{ $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'visit_reason').text }}

What to bring:
• Valid ID
• Insurance card (if applicable)
• List of current medications

You will receive a reminder 24 hours before your appointment.

If you need to reschedule, please contact us at least 24 hours in advance.

See you soon!

parameters.dateTime: ={{ DateTime.fromISO($('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_date').date + 'T' + $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_time').text + ':00').minus({hours: 24}).toISO() }}

parameters.message: =Reminder: You have an appointment tomorrow at {{ $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_time').text }}. Please bring your ID and insurance card. Reply STOP to opt out.

parameters.dateTime: ={{ DateTime.fromISO($('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_date').date + 'T' + $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_time').text + ':00').minus({hours: 1}).toISO() }}

parameters.message: =Your appointment is in 1 hour at {{ $('Typeform — New Patient Form').item.json.answers.find(a => a.field.ref === 'appointment_time').text }}. See you soon!
